objective: Rebaseline BWS as a downstream application built on betting-win
required_proof: Active authority docs, baseline inventory, task ledger, validators and controller task agree

objective: Implement exact betting-win upstream lock and compatibility verification
required_proof: Existing sibling checkout committed HEAD is verified read-only, dirty worktree state is excluded without cloning or mutation, lock uses deterministic tracked-tree proof, mismatch tests fail closed

objective: Create the BWS TypeScript workspace and migrate existing local modules into stable packages
required_proof: Workspace builds under Node 20, legacy src behavior is preserved by compatibility tests, no provider code is copied

objective: Create surebet-owned PostgreSQL schema, migrations and repositories
required_proof: Only surebet.* is migrated, disposable PostgreSQL proof passes, restart and idempotency tests pass

objective: Implement immutable pinned-export intake for betting-win.strategy-export.v1
required_proof: SHA, schema, profile, generation and lineage validation pass; duplicate and mismatch cases fail closed

objective: Implement the read-only betting-win query/API client boundary
required_proof: Typed pagination, timeout, retry, provenance and contract negotiation tests pass against loopback fixtures

objective: Integrate canonical identity, rule, finality and terminal-scenario equivalence
required_proof: False friends, generation mismatch, rule mismatch and incomplete scenarios remain rejected

objective: Integrate opportunity derivation and complete-set detection
required_proof: Deterministic candidate grouping and terminal coverage tests pass without reciprocal-odds shortcuts

objective: Integrate quote, depth, fee, cost, rounding and capacity-constrained stake solving
required_proof: Fixed-point tests cover boundaries, no NaN/Infinity, insufficient depth and rounding infeasibility

objective: Integrate non-atomic completion and residual-exposure simulation
required_proof: Partial fill, rejection, expiry, rollback, restart and worst-case exposure tests pass

objective: Integrate settlement replay and correction/finality reconciliation
required_proof: Void, refund, correction, conflict and idempotent replay tests pass using betting-win provenance

objective: Implement reproducible surebet backtesting over pinned betting-win exports
required_proof: Look-ahead prevention, deterministic run hashes, fees/costs/capacity and replay reconciliation are proven

objective: Implement private paper runtime over the read-only betting-win boundary
required_proof: Bounded loopback runtime, reservations, completion, exposure, restart and kill criteria pass

objective: Implement surebet strategy ledger, reports and acceptance state
required_proof: Immutable run evidence, explicit blockers, no profitability claims and reconciliation gates pass

objective: Implement BWS read-only query service and API
required_proof: Bounded filters, pagination, provenance expansion, security headers and integration tests pass

objective: Implement bounded jobs, workers, checkpoints and dead-letter handling
required_proof: Lease, retry, checkpoint, restart, idempotency and observability tests pass

objective: Implement the BWS React operator cockpit on the betting-win design patterns
required_proof: Overview, opportunities, evidence, backtests, paper runs, exposure and blockers render from typed API contracts

objective: Implement configuration, security, observability and process definitions
required_proof: Fail-fast config, redaction, loopback defaults, health/readiness and process-contract tests pass

objective: Complete integrated local and loopback acceptance
required_proof: Clean install, migration, import, backtest, bounded paper, API, worker and UI proof passes without provider or execution access

objective: Create executable loopback-only BWS API and worker applications
required_proof: Canonical Node 20 entrypoints start from explicit configuration, run only surebet-owned migrations, bind the API to 127.0.0.1, execute bounded worker passes, shut down gracefully, and expose no provider or execution path

objective: Implement continuous immutable-export intake and convergence
required_proof: Explicit export mode validates the upstream lock, expected SHA, schema, profile, generations and lineage; durable cursor, deduplication, restart and idempotency tests pass without directory-scanning or mode fallback

objective: Implement continuous typed read-only API intake and convergence
required_proof: Explicit API mode negotiates the contract, uses bounded pagination, timeout and retry/backoff, persists provenance and checkpoints, and fails closed without provider credentials or automatic fallback

objective: Implement continuous private-paper scheduling and worker orchestration
required_proof: Exactly one selected upstream mode feeds persisted bounded jobs; leases, checkpoints, stale-input guards, kill criteria, restart, idempotency and settlement reconciliation tests pass

objective: Implement product-owned operator lifecycle
required_proof: runtime status and immutable evidence publication
column6: Canonical CLI or package start, status and stop commands manage only verified repo-owned loopback processes, redact secrets, preserve process identity, publish machine-readable health, readiness and evidence, and leave protected root automation wrappers unchanged

objective: Implement API
required_proof: cockpit and runtime convergence over persisted continuous paper state
column6: Read-only API and cockpit surfaces render accepted and blocked continuous cycles from surebet.* with bounded retention, provenance, checkpoints, restart and visible-failure coverage

objective: Complete closed-stack continuous-runtime acceptance and automation handoff
required_proof: Clean install, migration, explicit export and API modes, multi-cycle scheduling, crash/restart, API, worker, cockpit, health/readiness, immutable artifacts and a machine-readable paper-runtime handoff pass with execution closed

objective: Validate continuous private paper observation against an operator-approved betting-win runtime
required_proof: Requires explicit accepted export or API input, exact upstream lock, private operator configuration and retained runtime evidence; loopback proof alone cannot validate this gate

objective: Implement any real-money order or account mutation path
required_proof: Requires separate ADR, legal/compliance review, account policy, risk limits, kill switch and explicit operator approval
